title: atuna penangiana
intro: Atuna penangiana is a species of plant in the family Sapindaceae, commonly known as the 'Penang ironwood' or 'Malaysian ironwood', native to Southeast Asia. The medicinal properties of Atuna penangiana include its ability to lower blood pressure and act as an antidiabetic, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine. The health benefits associated with this plant include the reduction of cardiovascular disease risk factors and the potential to manage symptoms of diabetes. Atuna penangiana is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, which can be made by infusing the plant's leaves and bark in hot water.
